summary: Completed testing for Iteration 30 - P0 Auth Bug Fix and AI Product Editor Bulk Enhancement. Backend tests: 11/11 passed. Frontend tests: All features working correctly. Session validation endpoint /api/users/me works as expected. AI Product Editor bulk enhancement UI fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Session validation endpoint /api/users/me correctly validates user_id against both users and agents collections
Frontend AuthContext.jsx properly calls validateSession() on app load
AI Product Editor bulk selection mode has proper visual feedback with checkmarks
Select All/Deselect All toggle works correctly
Product selection count updates dynamically in the Enhance button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 tested P0 Auth Bug Fix and AI Product Editor Bulk Enhancement. Key endpoints: /api/users/me?user_id=<id> for session validation, /api/agents/login for login. AI Product Editor at /ai-product-editor has bulk mode with Select All, Cancel, and Enhance buttons. Session persistence is working correctly after page reloads.

P0_auth_fix./api/users/me with valid user_id: PASS - Returns user data with permissions
P0_auth_fix./api/users/me with invalid user_id: PASS - Returns 401 'User not found - session invalid'

ai_product_editor_bulk_enhancement.Products can be selected with visual fee: PASS - Checkmark appears on selected products

known_issues.note: Initial navigation to protected routes may redirect to login if session not yet validated - this is expected behavior
